name: funkytown
description: Heavily processed coffees with two variants: Adaptive for full control, Simple for consistent results
author: Unknown

variants.label: Funkytown Adaptive
variants.notes: For heavily processed coffees - Co-Ferments, Double Anaerobic, etc. with adaptive control

variants.label: Funkytown Simple
variants.notes: For heavily processed coffees - Co-Ferments, Double Anaerobic, etc. with standard control
